---
title: cousera-machine_learning_week2
author: xiaoyu
date: '2020-09-12'
slug: cousera-machine-learning-week2
output: 
  html_document:
   toc: true
 
categories:
  - Machine Learning
tags:
  - gradient descent
  - Octave
  - multivariable
  - feature scaling
  - normal equation
draft: yes
---
这是该系列笔记的第二篇。
